questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The elements of group 13 exhibit variable valency.
questions.reason: Reason (R): This is due to the presence of more than one oxidation state in these elements.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A

(D) A is false but R is true

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Bismuth is the only element in group 15 that exhibits +5 oxidation state.
questions.reason: Reason (R): This is because bismuth has a relatively low electronegativity value.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Bismuth is the only element in group 15 that exhibits +5 oxidation state. This is due to its relatively low electronegativity value, which makes it easier for bismuth to lose five electrons and form a stable +5 oxidation state.
